title: Fabian
html: Stub. Mentioned in 2022 10 15 things on 10 1415 2022 — Yahir uses Fabian as the "change is the only constant" example when talking Dad through his rut, lying that Fabian is now homeless and no longer OSIG president to make the rhetorical point land. Real status of Fabian unknown from this artifact alone.
